ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Linear Regression, Random Forest) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_run" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the model table */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the dataset table */,
  "run_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the evaluation run was performed */,
  "run_parameters" TEXT /* JSON field to store any parameters or settings used during the evaluation run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the user table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the evaluation_run table */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
